vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear
Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance
Actuation - role: Motor pod / pusher prop mount dummy with bolt pattern and cooling path (non-operational)

risk.desc: Potential weak interface at motor mount due to load concentration.
risk.mit: Review and reinforce the motor mount interface.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling for motor mount under high load.
risk.mit: Increase cooling inlet size or add additional cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of blocked access to equipment bay door for maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure clear access paths and adequate clearance around door.

risk.desc: Risk of tolerance mismatch between subsystems.
risk.mit: Review and adjust tolerances to ensure proper fit.

risk.desc: Risk of process limitations affecting part quality.
risk.mit: Conduct process validation and adjust as necessary.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.description: Distributes wing bending loads to motor mount
Cooling air flow for motor mount
Heat dissipation from motor mount to wing structure
Opening and closing of equipment bay door
Electrical harness routing for motor mount

integration_opportunities.description: Access to equipment bay door for maintenance
Inspection of motor mount and cooling path
Thermal management path for motor mount

verification_focus.requirement: Structural integrity under wing bending loads
Service access for equipment bay door

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Provide a continuous load path from wing skins through spar to fuselage frames
Ensure airflow through wing cavity to cooling ribs
Transfer heat from electronics to cooling ribs
Handle wing bending and torsion loads through spar to fuselage frames
Withstand atmospheric pressure around wing skins to spar
Route wiring harness from wing electronics to fuselage

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal definitions with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must be reciprocal between neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: All critical joints have visible locking evidence and preload intent.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
verify must include a boundary_conditions object.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between CFRP and EPP foam core.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion analysis and adjust joint clearances accordingly.

risk.desc: Risk of delamination at the CFRP/EPP interface under repeated loading.
risk.mit: Implement additional bonding layers and perform durability testing.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload in bolted joints due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Specify torque values and conduct preload verification during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access due to limited clearance around service entry.
risk.mit: Increase clearance around service entry to ensure easy access.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at the wing root if load path is not continuous.
risk.mit: Ensure continuous load path from spar to fuselage frames with proper fittings.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.path: Lift and landing loads from wing skins through spar to fuselage frames
Airflow through wing cavity to cooling ribs
Heat transfer from electronics to cooling ribs
Wing bending and torsion loads through spar to fuselage frames
Atmospheric pressure around wing skins to spar
Wiring harness from wing electronics to fuselage

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual and tactile inspection for alignment and fit

verification_focus.check: Lift, landing, and payload loads trace through continuous structure: spar to carry-through to fuselage frames, with fittings at every load transfer
Heat transfer from electronics to cooling ribs
Wiring harness from wing electronics to fuselage

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion testing and adjust material selection or design if necessary.

generated_parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2

requirements: Design an FDM-printable assembly for elevon servo pockets in a fixed-wing UAV wing.
Each pocket must securely mount a servo, control horn, and pushrod channel.
Ensure removable access cover for maintenance, thermal airflow, and wiring harness routing.
